positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a cosmic sloth swinging through vibrant nebulae and constellations. The sloth should have a silhouetted form, accented with glowing bioluminescent trails of stardust and galactic dust. The overall aesthetic is vaporwave meets astronomical wonder, utilizing deep indigo, sapphire blue, electric magenta, and pops of neon cyan. Highly detailed, clean vector lines, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, high contrast, dramatic dramatic lighting, flat graphic style, centered on a black background.
